subsystems.name: Superstructure
subsystems.purpose: Coordinates intake, indexer, shooter, pivots, and turret into named operating states.
safetyConditions: Reject unsafe state requests instead of forcing motion.
Keep auto-state selection and teleop override from fighting each other.
operatorOutcomes: Drivers can read requested versus current state quickly.
Debugging can compare expected state intent with actual behavior.

states.name: IDLING
states.expectedMotion: Actuators settle into safe hold behavior.
states.transitionConditions: Default fallback when no higher-priority state is active.
states.faultBlockers: Hard faults can force conservative fallback behavior.

states.name: INTAKING
states.expectedMotion: Intake deploys, intake rollers and indexer move fuel inward.
states.readyCondition: Intake path is clear and deploy geometry is reached.
states.transitionConditions: Entered by operator request or intake-capable workflow.
states.faultBlockers: Pivot zeroing, jams, or sensor disagreement block action.

states.name: SHOOTING
states.expectedMotion: Shooter spins up, pivots move to shot angle, turret tracks target.
states.readyCondition: Velocity, angle, and turret are within tolerance and shoot gate is enabled.
states.transitionConditions: Entered by operator or auto shot request.
states.faultBlockers: Missing vision, turret faults, or shooter not at speed prevent readiness.

states.name: FERRYING
states.purpose: Score to a ferry target outside the main hub zone.
states.expectedMotion: Shooter and turret target a ferry solution while drivetrain remains field-oriented.
states.readyCondition: Turret and shooter satisfy ferry tolerances.
states.transitionConditions: Entered when ferry targeting is preferred over hub targeting.
states.faultBlockers: Target ambiguity or pose estimate issues block action.

subsystems.name: Intake
subsystems.purpose: Collects fuel and feeds the indexer.
safetyConditions: Do not command aggressive roller motion while stowed.
Zeroing routines must own pivot motion when active.
operatorOutcomes: Drivers can see whether the intake is deployed and holding rollers.
Debuggers can separate deploy faults from roller faults.

states.name: DEPLOYED
states.expectedMotion: Pivot moves to deploy angle and rollers can run inward.
states.readyCondition: Deploy angle reached and zeroing is not active.
states.transitionConditions: Entered by deploy toggle or intake-capable superstate.
states.faultBlockers: Zeroing, sensor faults, or soft-limit violations.

states.name: STOWED
states.expectedMotion: Pivot retracts and rollers idle or briefly clear fuel path.
states.transitionConditions: Entered when intake demand ends or robot returns to idle.
states.faultBlockers: Blocked travel or missing pivot feedback.

subsystems.name: Turret
subsystems.purpose: Rotates the shooter toward scoring targets.
safetyConditions: Yield manual commands to zeroing and fault handling.
operatorOutcomes: Readiness depends on stable at-goal confirmation.
The systems tab explains whether aim issues are target, pose, or mechanism related.

states.name: TRACKING
states.expectedMotion: Turret rotates toward a computed target and holds there.
states.transitionConditions: Entered during hub or ferry aim workflows.
states.faultBlockers: Pose uncertainty or turret health faults.

states.name: HOLD
states.expectedMotion: Turret resists drift at current or parked heading.
states.transitionConditions: Used in idle, disabled, or fallback behavior.
states.faultBlockers: Encoder loss or latched mechanism fault.
